name: Melt in Your Mouth Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add 4 tablespoons sugar to the egg whites, beating well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, cream the butter and vanilla extract.
4. Add the remaining 3/4 cup sugar to the butter mixture, then beat in the egg yolks.
5. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
6. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, mixing until just combined.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture into the batter.
8. Stir in the blueberries.
9. Grease an 8 x 8 inch pan.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
11. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Serve warm, as it serves 9 people.
